channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: 待翻译：A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: usestrix/strix
item.description: 待翻译：Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

item.title: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
item.description: 待翻译："Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"

item.title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
item.description: 待翻译：A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video.

item.title: facebook/astryx
item.description: 待翻译：An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

item.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
item.description: 待翻译：Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

item.title: allenai/olmocr
item.description: 待翻译：Toolkit for linearizing PDFs for LLM datasets/training

item.title: logto-io/logto
item.description: 待翻译：🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1 with multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.

item.title: togatoga/karukan
item.description: 待翻译：Japanese Input Method System for Linux, macOS, Neural Kana-Kanji Conversion Engine

item.title: Mebus/cupp
item.description: 待翻译：Common User Passwords Profiler (CUPP)

item.title: Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw
item.description: 待翻译：基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。

item.title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
item.description: 待翻译：12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

item.title: refactoringhq/tolaria
item.description: 待翻译：Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

item.title: ogulcancelik/herdr
item.description: 待翻译：agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
item.description: 待翻译：18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council

item.title: altic-dev/FluidVoice
item.description: 待翻译：Fastest and only macOS Dictation app with on-device STT and custom trained AI enhancement model - Local Wispr Flow alternative. One ⭐ takes us a long way :)) Windows, iOS and Linux coming soon.

item.title: CoreBunch/Instatic
item.description: 待翻译：Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS - get it running in 1 minute

item.title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
item.description: 待翻译：Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

item.title: browser-use/video-use
item.description: 待翻译：Edit videos with coding agents

item.title: yikart/AiToEarn
item.description: 待翻译：Let's use AI to Earn!
